name: Deep Book vs BBO Divergence Reversal
hypothesis: When the BBO shows strong buying pressure (`obi_1 > 0.7`) but the deeper book shows selling pressure (`obi_ex_bbo < -0.3`), the BBO is likely fragile and about to be overrun. This divergence signals a probable reversal, predicting a price decrease.
mutation_note: New exploratory signal based on the 'BBO stall' concept from microstructure theory, where disagreement between BBO and deeper liquidity predicts a reversal. This tests a contra-directional hypothesis.
